channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Montreal Lawyer Remains Detained Amid Multiple Child Sexual Offence Charges
item.description: Daniel Rochefort, a 72-year-old civil lawyer from Montreal, has been denied bail following charges including child luring and sexual assault. He was first arrested on May 7 and faces allegations of co...

item.title: Corpus Christi Faces Severe Water Shortage Amid Drought and Growing Industrial Demand
item.description: Corpus Christi, Texas, and the surrounding Coastal Bend region are facing a significant water shortage that has impacted residents, businesses, and industrial operations. Since August 2024, restrictio...

item.title: Cockroach Janta Party founder reports multiple social media accounts hacked
item.description: NEW DELHI: The founder of the satirical Cockroach Janta Party (CJP), Abhijeet Dipke, announced on Saturday that his Instagram account and the party’s official page were hacked, shortly after the digit...

item.title: Gor Mahia poised to secure 22nd FKF Premier League crown amid legal dispute
item.description: Gor Mahia are just a win away from clinching their record-extending 22nd FKF Premier League title. With 68 points, a victory over Mara Sugar at Raila Odinga Stadium in Homa Bay on Sunday would take th...

item.title: Cameron Diaz’s Breakthrough Audition for 'The Mask' at Age 21
item.description: In 1993, Cameron Diaz, a 21-year-old model with no prior acting experience, auditioned for what would become her breakout role as Tina Carlyle in 'The Mask.' Initially seeking only a minor background ...

item.title: SAHRC Opens Probe into Alleged Hate Speech by Dis-Chem Shareholder
item.description: The South African Human Rights Commission (SAHRC) has initiated an investigation into allegations of racist and derogatory remarks made by lawyer and Dis-Chem shareholder, Mark Saltzman. The controver...

item.title: Britney Spears arrested for DUI in California, exhibits unusual behaviour during police encounter
item.description: Pop singer Britney Spears, aged 44, was arrested in southern California after being stopped for driving erratically at high speed in her BMW convertible. During the incident, police noted that she dis...

item.title: Grateful Dead’s Inaugural Performance at Magoo’s Pizza in 1965
item.description: On May 5, 1965, the Grateful Dead, originally performing under the name The Warlocks, played their very first show at Magoo’s Pizza in Menlo Park, California. After discovering that another band alrea...

item.title: SpaceX successfully tests Starship V3 despite booster failure during return
item.description: On May 22, 2026, SpaceX conducted the first test flight of its upgraded Starship V3 from its Starbase facility in Texas. The 407-foot rocket, the largest and most powerful built by SpaceX, lifted off ...

item.title: 1942 Tennessee Case: 14-Year-Old Mattie Pearl Manning Convicted of Husband’s Murder
item.description: In June 1942, a tragic and highly publicized case unfolded in Lowland, Hamblen County, Tennessee. Mattie Pearl Manning, a 14-year-old child bride with only a second-grade education, and her father, Fr...

item.title: Tanzania Implements Plans for Climate-Resilient Urban Growth
item.description: Tanzania is moving quickly to prevent chaotic growth in its fast-expanding cities by introducing structured urban planning strategies. The government is targeting peri-urban areas around major cities ...

item.title: Barcelona and Lyon face off again in the Women's Champions League in Oslo
item.description: Barcelona and Lyon, two of the most successful teams in women's football, are set to renew their Champions League rivalry in Oslo. Both clubs have a storied history in the UEFA Women's Champions Leagu...

item.title: Political Narratives on Charter Change Amid Senate Instability
item.description: The recent narrative pushed by Senate President Alan Peter Cayetano and Senator Imee Marcos about charter change in the Philippines faces significant political challenges. Despite claims linking Senat...

item.title: Penticton invests in CCTV and policing hub to enhance waterfront safety
item.description: The City of Penticton is taking proactive steps to improve safety along Lakeshore Drive, one of the busiest waterfront areas on Okanagan Lake. City council approved nearly $130,000 in funding for enha...

item.title: U.S. Nonprofits Respond to Government Pressure and Threats
item.description: In recent years, social scientists have highlighted concerns about the rise of authoritarian strategies in democratic countries, often referred to as the “authoritarian playbook.” Although no official...

item.title: Orlando Pirates Aim for Premiership Glory in Season Finale Against Orbit College
item.description: Orlando Pirates are gearing up for a high-stakes clash against Orbit College at Mbombela Stadium in the final round of the Betway Premiership. Assistant coach Mandla Ncikazi has emphasised the importa...

item.title: Montreal Canadiens Show Remarkable Performance in Playoffs with Youthful Energy
item.description: The Montreal Canadiens are demonstrating a remarkable playoff performance, reminiscent of their 1971, 1986, and 1993 Stanley Cup-winning teams. Despite facing a dominant Carolina Hurricanes squad in t...

item.title: Street Life and Culture in 1970s New York City
item.description: The 1970s in New York City were a period marked by striking contrasts between urban decline and cultural innovation. Known as “Fear City,” the metropolis struggled with a severe fiscal crisis, which l...

item.title: Delhi Government to Focus on Treated Wastewater for Yamuna Instead of Ganga Diversion
item.description: The Delhi government’s proposal to divert 500 cusecs of water from the Ganga to the Yamuna, initiated last year under a central project to rejuvenate the Yamuna, is now facing major feasibility challe...

item.title: CMAT condemns fascism and calls on artists to take a stand at Ivor Novello Awards
item.description: Irish musician CMAT used her acceptance speech at the 2026 Ivor Novello Awards in London to address pressing political issues, urging fellow artists to take a stand rather than remain neutral. Winning...
